description: Create a professional network topology diagram for Apex Manufacturing LLC based on the network inventory provided in '~/Desktop/network_inventory.txt' for a security audit. The diagram must visualize all 16 devices using appropriate networking shapes, labeled with their Name and IP Address, and connected according to the inventory's connection summary. Demarcate and label network zones (Internet Edge, DMZ, Server Farm, Office LAN, Wireless) using dashed boundaries. Include a second page titled 'IP Address Plan' that summarizes the VLANs and subnets. Save the project to '~/Desktop/network_topology.drawio' and export the topology diagram as a PNG to '~/Desktop/network_topology.png'.
